name: Mindee
description: AI-powered document parsing and OCR API. Extract structured data from invoices, receipts, passports, bank statements, and custom documents with high accuracy.

capabilities.name: invoice_predict
capabilities.description: Parse an invoice document to extract structured data including line items, totals, dates, and supplier information.

capabilities.name: invoice_predict_async
capabilities.description: Submit an invoice for asynchronous parsing and receive a job ID to poll for results.

capabilities.name: invoice_get_async
capabilities.description: Retrieve the results of an asynchronous invoice parsing job.

capabilities.name: receipt_predict
capabilities.description: Parse a receipt to extract merchant name, date, totals, taxes, and line items.

capabilities.name: passport_predict
capabilities.description: Parse a passport document to extract personal information including name, nationality, and dates.

capabilities.name: financial_document_predict
capabilities.description: Parse any financial document (invoice or receipt) with automatic type detection and field extraction.

capabilities.name: bank_statement_predict
capabilities.description: Parse a bank statement to extract account details, transactions, and balances.

capabilities.name: custom_predict
capabilities.description: Parse a document using a custom-trained model with user-defined fields.
